content: Phase 1: Skip POC - assets already prepared (frames extracted, WebP converted, 30.5MB→388KB)
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 2: Create boot sequence + 32-frame image sequence player with preload
Phase 2: Build sticky glassmorphism Navbar with active section + mobile hamburger
Phase 2: Hero section with staggered text reveal + premium CTAs
Phase 2: About section with profile photo + bio
Phase 2: Skills section with 3D interactive cards
Phase 2: Featured Projects (3 cards with 3D tilt)
Phase 2: Lernio AI Live section with iframe + 3D browser frame + case study
Phase 2: Contact section with form + social links
Phase 2: Three.js / R3F 3D objects (laptop, brain, code cube, particles)
Phase 2: GSAP/Framer Motion animations + scroll reveals
Phase 2: Mobile responsive optimization with lighter 3D fallbacks
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
